detectors.description:

	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck

	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2

	- ExpExponentCleanup

It is used by:
	- ^0.4.24 (TOSC.sol#1)
